## Discussion

The framework sets this property to the subclass’s initializer argument; for example, see [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASENumberMetaParameterDefinition/init(value:)].

An app changes the value at runtime by calling [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASENumberMetaParameter/fade(value:duration:)] on the subclass.

# value

**Instance Property**

A value for the metaparameter.

## Declaration

```swift
var value: Any { get set }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets this property to the subclass’s initializer argument; for example, see [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASENumberMetaParameterDefinition/init(value:)].

An app changes the value at runtime by calling [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASENumberMetaParameter/fade(value:duration:)] on the subclass.
